paper_metadata.title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation
paper_metadata.abstract: We present a large, tunable neural conversational response generation model, DialoGPT (dialogue generative pre-trained transformer). Trained on 147M conversation-like exchanges extracted from Reddit comment chains over a period spanning from 2005 through 2017, DialoGPT extends the Hugging Face PyTorch transformer to attain a performance close to human both in terms of automatic and human evaluation in single-turn dialogue settings. We show that conversational systems that leverage DialoGPT generate more relevant, contentful and context-consistent responses than strong baseline systems. The pre-trained model and training pipeline are publicly released to facilitate research into neural response generation and the development of more intelligent open-domain dialogue systems.

extraction_data.innovation: Largest-scale pre-training of a Transformer-based model for conversational response generation, with improved performance on complex tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (not specified in paper, inferred from context)

extraction_data.research_problem: Generating informative and engaging conversational responses
extraction_data.application: Conversational response generation, chatbots, dialogue systems
extraction_data.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

extraction_data.innovation: DialoGPT is a large-scale pre-trained conversational model trained on Reddit data to generate contextually relevant and informative responses. It uses a Transformer-based decoder architecture and is designed to be fine-tuned for various dialogue tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Generating contextually relevant and informative responses in conversational systems
extraction_data.application: Conversational response generation, chatbots, dialogue systems
